SELECT: SELECT query to retrieve data from a table
INSERT: Insert new records into a table
UPDATE: Update existing records in a table
UNION: Combine results from multiple SELECT queries
ATTRIBUTE_CONSTANT_PAIR: Attribute-value pair required for the update block
CREATE_TABLE: Create a new table in the database
ALTER_TABLE: Modify the structure of an existing table
DROP_TABLE: Delete a table from the database
ATTRIBUTE: Select an attribute from the table
CONSTANT: Define a constant value to use in queries
